holdings.infoBox: WINN is an equity ETF with a total of 72 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.24%, Apple at 7.78%, Alphabet at 7.66%, Amazon.com at 6.68%, and Broadcom at 6.32%.

overview.description: The Harbor Long-Term Growers ETF (WINN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of large- and mid-cap US stocks that have above-average prospects for long-term growth. Securities are selected using a proprietary combination of bottom-up, fundamental research and systematic portfolio construction. WINN was launched on Feb 2, 2022 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: WINN ETF: Can You Really Win with This ETF?
data.text: The aptly-named Harbor Long-Term Growers ETF (NYSE:WINN) is an actively-managed ETF focused on long-term growth stocks that has posted a sizzling gain of nearly 40% year-to-date so far in 2023.
